prose: TEMPO frontier-orbital gap calculated using DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier standard, density-fitted) in PySCF at the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2 (open-shell radical). Geometry provided as user input (29 atoms), treated as a fixed single point. SCF converged in 12 cycles. HOMO = −6.338 eV, LUMO = −2.465 eV, HOMO–LUMO gap = 3.872 eV. Total electronic energy −483.88366 Hartree (−13167.145 eV). Command: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --mult 2 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz. Integrity check passed; all validation criteria satisfied.
